name: THENA
special_mechanism_summary: THENA implements Solidly-derived ve(3,3) on BSC: veTHE is a vote-escrowed NFT representing locked THE plus time. veTHE holders vote weekly on gauge weights to direct THE emissions to liquidity pools, with 80% of protocol fees going to veTHE voters and 20% to theNFT stakers. Default gauge emission cap is 5% per pool.
notes: C3' combination potential: ve(3,3) protocols have a documented bribery equilibrium where protocols pay veTHE voters to direct emissions to their pools; 80% fee distribution to voters makes vote-buying economically rational for protocols that can extract more than 80% of fees from a pool; separate 20% theNFT staker revenue stream can be isolated from gauge voting dynamics for targeted strategies. sub-threshold accepted by user decision (TVL $4.36M < $20M BSC threshold; BSC active gauge-ve gap — PancakeSwap veCAKE is deprecated, THENA is the only active ve(3,3) on BSC).
